problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Deep. Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
